page_content:
Formerly: GEOL489I.

GEOL488 Geology Colloquium (1 Credit)

Contemporary research topics and issues in geosciences are explored through the weekly Geology departmental colloquium and discussion of its contents.

Prerequisite: At least one 300 or 400-level Geology course of at least 3 credits.

Restriction: May not be taken concurrently with GEOL497 or GEOL497H. Repeatable to: 4 credits.
